text: Being here, I feel a curious sense of transition—from the stark, silent openness of an empty, functional space to the stimulating, colorful engagement of a display dedicated to research and development. The first image leaves me contemplative and slightly disoriented, surrounded by echoes and possibilities. In the second, I feel intellectually invigorated and intrigued, confronted by the promise of human-machine synergy and the evidence of active creativity. This movement between spaces reveals the tension between emptiness and potential, silence and inquiry.
